task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation application is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface (map view or main menu) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Settings menu in the Sygic app is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu with a 'Settings' header or a list of application configuration options is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'View & Units' settings section is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen titled 'View & Units' (or containing display/map appearance settings) is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Color scheme' setting is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Color scheme' is visible within the settings list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Color scheme' is set to switch automatically.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Color scheme' setting displays 'Switch automatically' as its selected value, or a dialog/menu shows 'Switch automatically' being actively selected.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal emulators, command prompts, or ADB shell interfaces are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Sygic app interface with its distinct map and settings UI, rather than a text editor, browser, or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify that the setting was changed in the actual configuration menu.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Switch automatically' option is selected within the app's native settings list or dialog box, not just typed into a search bar or note-taking app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target setting is exactly named 'Color scheme' and is located under the 'View & Units' settings menu. The correct value to select for automatic day/night switching is 'Switch automatically'.
